method: Bin objects by Megethos decile. Within each bin, PCA on non-Megethos phonemes (axes 1-4). Compare to random null.
interpretation: At constant Megethos, the remaining phonemes (rank, symmetry, arithmetic, spectral) have 1.57x more structure than random. This is modest but real. The non-Megethos axes carry genuine cross-domain information that is NOT explained by complexity alone.
honest_caveat: 1.57x is significant but not overwhelming. The dominant axis is still Megethos/complexity. The remaining structure is real but secondary. About 60% of non-Megethos structure is noise, 40% is signal.

bin_detail.note: high Megethos bin — fewer domains but strong structure
